**_M &A Business Advisors_** is a full-service Business Brokerage and Lower Middle Market M&A Advisory Firm and the  _**Leader in Business Sales & Acquisitions**_. ** _M &A Business Advisors_** specializes in the **CONFIDENTIAL** sale of privately-owned businesses in a wide range of industries including ** _Manufacturing, Distribution, Service, E- Commerce, Technology, Software, Health Care, Education, Construction, Automotive, Food & Beverage Related Businesses_** _as well as other industries._ We use proprietary methods and advanced technology to better serve our clients and accomplish their objectives.
_**M &A Business Advisors **_are highly respected, experienced Advisors who are recognized as some of the top deal makers in the Business Brokerage and M&A industry. Our Advisors have extensive backgrounds as well as years of experience and knowledge in a wide range of industries. We work as a “Team” to collaborate and share our knowledge and expertise to best represent our clients. Our Advisors hold some of the top designations in the industry including the  _Certified Business Intermediaries (_ CBI) designation issued by the International Business Broker Association (IBBA), the  _Lifetime Certified Business Intermediaries_ (L-CBI) designation issued by the International Business Broker Association (IBBA), the Merger and Acquisition Master Intermediary (M&AMI) designation issued by M&A Source, and the  _Certified Business Brokers_ (CBB) designation issued by the California Association of Business Brokers. Our Advisors are considered “Influencers” and have been instrumental in improving the standards and ethics within the industry.
Selling or buying a business can be a complex, time consuming process. The process involves 100% commitment and a “hands on” approach by the Advisor along with expertise in a wide range of fields such as financing, accounting, commercial leases, contracts, managing due diligence, negotiations, preparing contracts and more. Our years of experience along with our proprietary process and ability to work as a team to solve complex issues that arise in transactions is what separates us from the competition. Rest assured that when you are working with a M&A Business Advisor, you are working with the  _**Leader in Business Sales & Acquisitions.**_
Our team of experienced Business Brokers / M&A Advisors serve Business Owners throughout California and Nevada including the areas of [Los Angeles](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/los-angeles/), [Ventura](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/los-angeles/), [Orange County](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/orangecounty/), [San Diego](https://mabusinessadvisors.com/san-diego/), [San Francisco / Marin](https://mabusinessadvisors.com/sanfrancisco/), [San Francisco – East Bay](https://mabusinessadvisors.com/sfeastbay/), [San Jose / Palo Alto](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/sanjose/), [Sacramento / Roseville](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/sacramento/), [Reno / Sparks](http://mabusinessadvisors.com/reno), and [Las Vegas](https://mabusinessadvisors.com/las-vegas/).
Please refer to our list of offices and contact one of our Advisors  
near you for a complimentary consultation.

## Testimonials
> My name is George Russell and I am the co-founder of a commercial HVAC contracting business, SaferAir, in Orange County, California. I co-founded the company about 15 years ago and decided along with coowner, Christina Baldwin, that it was time to sell. Around that same time James Reppert contacted us and offered to sell our business. We had several meetings with James and we were impressed with his background, knowledge and understanding, so we hired him to represent us. James quickly went to work and put together a detailed package on our business including the company financial history, cash flow analysis, features and benefits, industry information, etc. We established the parameters the buyer would need to have in order to receive a package and then went to market. James brought to us a number of qualified prospective buyers for us to consider over the initial 6-month period. Ultimately, James came up with what we think was an ideal match for our company and we ended up selling our business to them. The most remarkable thing about this 11-month process was James’ attention to detail. He was there for every question we had and made the process more comfortable for us. The details and complexity were somewhat overwhelming and we had underestimated what was involved. James managed the entire process efficiently, including finding and screening prospective buyers, working well with our attorney, bringing in additional support from his company when needed, plus so much more. Everything was handled in a timely and professional matter. We’re not sure we could have managed all that and continued to run our successful business. James always seemed to know what was going to happen next and prepared us for all the steps involved in this process. We are very thankful to James and would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a professional Business Broker to sell their business.
> George Russell President at Commercial HVAC contracting business, SaferAir
> You and your staff have probably added 10 years to our lives. I believe in these uncertain times it was an excellent job all around. I will continue to send you leads on anyone I hear that’s interested in selling or buying a business.
> Jerry Cail, President Bear Industries Printing & Publishing
> The entire process was handled extremely professional and I look forward to working with you again.
> Klaus Grimm, Managing Member K & KG Investments, LLC

Who Built It
## Who is Behind This?
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/c53cgf9X6ctC93ShgFLhKQugA.webp)
**Hi. I'm Vlad Oleksiienko (growth at Reply.io). I help companies reach out to SaaS and tech compnaies.**
Over my 8 years at Reply.io, I’ve seen how much time founders, VCs, marketers, and business development teams waste building high-quality prospect lists from scratch. Hours of manual research are spent just to gather accurate and relevant data.
That’s why I built LeadWave - to provide a ready-to-use, always-up-to-date list of 18,000 SaaS companies enriched with valuable data points. I also used this list for my own projects, and it’s been so useful in saving time and finding the right opportunities.
LeadWave helps you skip the grind and focus on what matters: growing your startup or business, building connections, and creating impact. My mission is to eliminate tedious research and empower you to make faster, smarter decisions.

## Intelligent transformation.
We empower our clients to harness the transformative power of AI by enabling smarter decision-making, automating complex processes, personalizing customer experiences, driving innovation, and securing competitive advantages.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/solutions/ankura-ai)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F9c6a1189-home-hero-conflict.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## The right experts at the right time.
Our team of cross-industry, cross-disciplinary experts are trusted advisors who partner with our clients – listening, learning, and charting the next steps that Protect, Create, and Recover Value through challenging times or events.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/conflict)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F8edb1760-home-hero-distress.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Critical expertise in crisis situations.
Disruption is the new normal and change will continue to accelerate at a dramatic pace. Our global team delivers the strategies and solutions that keep our clients ahead. Where others advise, we solve. Where others consult, we partner.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/distress)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F5e589e9e-home-hero-performance.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## For the opportunity. For the future.
We are a firm of experts and advisors uniquely built to tackle each challenge or need, and we effectively combine the right expertise into solutions, services, and results. We don’t just talk about bringing the best together; we do it.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/performance)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2Fe73f887f-home-hero-risk.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Global coverage. Targeted impact.
Where industries, disciplines, technologies, and trends intersect and when existential moments and events overlap – Ankura is there, putting our world-class expertise to work for our clients. We develop and execute creative, end-to-end solutions and provide the expertise and skills our clients need at critical moments. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/risk)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F1d862b8e-home-hero-strategy.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Collaborative lateral thinking.
We are the experts and advisors who advise the world’s leading governments, businesses, and institutions to solve their biggest challenges and most complex problems by developing game-changing ideas that achieve positive outcomes.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/strategy)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F9c66b5e6-home-hero-transformation.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Experts in motion. Advisors in action. 
Our multidisciplinary expertise comes together with efficiency and speed, allowing us to respond to events, and generate solutions in real-time. Integrating seamlessly across the firm, our team of experts and advisors work together in a collaborative model to address the challenges our clients face. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/transformation)

First-time founder, student, or corporate innovator?
Shape, validate, and package your business idea from scratch — [all in one chat](https://pitchbob.io/#pricing) with our bot. 📄
Already have a pitch deck or one-pager?
Don’t want to chat with the bot but need all the docs? Or want them in another language? Just 📥 [drop your file in the chat](https://pitchbob.io/products/improve-pitch-deck) — the bot handles the rest and emails everything to you. Flat one-time $99. No hassle.

Fundraising-mode founder or grant-seeking entrepreneur?

Get hands-on support from our [founder mentorship & tracking program ](https://pitchbob.io/services/startup-mentorship-and-tracking)or activate our 📬 [investor & client outreach team](https://pitchbob.io/services/outreach-team) to accelerate your journey. Use what you need, when you need it.
🔁
Working on your startup long-term?
Need structure, discipline, and a continuous improvement mindset? 🧭 [PitchBob Founders Co-Pilot](https://pitchbob.io/products/ai-startup-founders-co-pilot) supports your monthly rhythm with planning, reflection, and auto-generated founder/stakeholder reports. From $19.9/month.

We offer 🏷️ [white-label](https://pitchbob.io/services/white-label) solutions starting from $99/month, 📊 [VC pipeline scoring](https://pitchbob.io/products/vc) scoring, 🔎 [free startup scouting](https://pitchbob.io/services/scout-startup), and 🎁 [perk partnerships](https://pitchbob.io/blog/perk-partnership-proposition-for-startup-accelerators-and-incubators) for your community.

## Why Your Funnel Isn’t Converting Like It Should
## Most marketers are running traffic to broken funnels. Here’s where the leaks happen... and why most fixes don’t stick.
###  You’re Guessing at the Strategy 
Without a clear customer journey, your campaigns feel scattered and your conversions reflect it. 
###  Your Messaging Doesn’t Hit 
Most funnels focus on what you want to say, not what your customer needs to hear. That disconnect kills conversion. 
###  You’re Losing the Sale Post-Click 
Even if your ad works, your funnel isn’t optimized to convert clicks into actual sale and there’s no follow-up. 
###  You Have No Retention or Follow-Up 
Most funnels are built for first-time buyers only. If you’re not maximizing LTV, you’re leaving money on the table every month. 
## Think you might be leaking leads at one (or all) of these stages?
[ Get Your Free AI Funnel Audit ](https://go.digitalmarketer.com/ai-powered-marketing-audit)

What is DigitalMarketer, exactly?
DigitalMarketer is a training, tools, and community platform for marketers, entrepreneurs, and small business owners who want to scale with smarter systems and strategies… now enhanced by AI.
Do I need to be a tech expert to use what you offer?
Not at all. Our tools and training are built for real-world marketers and business owners. If you can write an email or run a Facebook ad, you’ll get value from day one.
Who is DigitalMarketer for?
We serve small business owners, marketers, coaches, consultants, agencies, and ecommerce brands. If you’re focused on growth and want to market smarter (not harder) you’re in the right place.
How does the free AI Funnel Audit work?
It’s simple: you answer a few quick questions, and our AI-powered system gives you a personalized report showing where leads are falling through the cracks, and how to fix it.
What if I already use other AI tools?
Perfect. Our tools and frameworks plug into whatever you’re already using. Think of DigitalMarketer as your AI-enhanced strategy and execution layer, not just another tool.

Yes! In addition to on-demand tools and courses, we offer a high-touch mentorship and implementation program called Elite, where we work directly with business owners who want expert support to scale fast.
